---
title: "Martin Petr"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/bodkan
    - text: Research
      url: https://scholar.google.cz/citations?user=h9-xAdAAAAAJ
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:contact@bodkan.net"
    - text: Twitter
      url: https://twitter.com/fleventy5

---

I am a researcher at the University of Copenhagen, Denmark.

I develop methods for spatial data analysis and simulation in genetics and ecology, hoping to unlock new insights into the evolutionary histories of humans and other species across space and time.

I also teach and mentor students. An important underlying theme of my work is the design of intuitive interfaces to complex computational methods useful for novice users and experts alike.
